problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
